namespace = sample
country_event = {
  id = sample.1
  title = sample.1.t
  category = ADM
  target = root
  goto = prev
  friend_scope = root
  ally = SWE
  gfx = westerngfx
  text_command = sample_defined_text
  dynasty = von_habsburg
  days = 30
  chance = 0.5
  hidden = no
  dynamic_fields = {
    alpha = 1
  }
  trigger = {
    has_country_flag = demo_flag
  }
  immediate = {
    add_prestige = 5
  }
}
